text: Lava outburst attacks with a beam attack on entities and sets them on fire.
Lava attack attacks with lava blocks, creates a block of water when it hits a block.
Surface melting creates 4 by 4 blocks of magma under the entities.
$(o)Condition:$() Within 16 blocks of lava/magma or in the Nether.
Volcanic Heart: 12.5% chance to deal critical damage (150% of base).
Hot Spring: Immune to fire and lava damage.
